message:
fix: support all postAttachCommand formats in attach command

Previously, the attach command only handled string format for
postAttachCommand via AsString(), silently ignoring array format
["npm", "start"] and object format {"task1": "...", "task2": "..."}.

This change:
- Replaces AsString() with ToStringSlice() to handle all three formats
- Iterates over all commands returned by ToStringSlice()
- Maintains warning behavior on failure
- Adds comprehensive unit tests for all postAttachCommand formats

Fixes Issue 1 from docs/plans/2025-11-26-adversarial-fixes.md

🤖 Generated with Claude Code
